batchExportOutputDirHint: Empty — next to each source file; otherwise all batch outputs go here.
editorBuiltinPresetLockedHint: Built-in presets cannot be renamed, overwritten, or deleted — save your own preset.
editorBuiltinPresetCloneNeedSelect: Select a built-in preset in the list to clone it.
editorTooltipPresetCloneBuiltin: Create an editable copy of the selected built-in preset
editorCopyFfmpegCommandTitle: Copy the command text to the clipboard — handy to rerun manually or share with support.
editorExtractFramesHint: Pick a video file or use the editor preview; frames are saved to a folder (same format as Save frame).
editorExtractFramesIntervalTitle: Save a frame every N seconds (min. 0.25)
editorExtractFramesInvalidManual: Enter at least one timestamp in seconds.
editorExtractFramesManualTitle: Comma- or line-separated times in seconds (up to 200)
editorExtractFramesModeTitle: Interval — every N seconds; count — evenly; manual — timestamp list in seconds
editorExtractFramesPickVideoTitle: Open another video file for frame extraction
editorExtractFramesRunTitle: Pick a folder and save a frame series via ffmpeg
editorExtractFramesUsePreviewTitle: Use the file loaded in the editor preview
editorVideoSpriteHint: One image: frames sampled evenly across the clip (ffmpeg fps + tile).
editorVideoSpriteBurnTimestampsTitle: Burn hms timecode in the corner of each frame before tiling
editorVideoSpriteRowsTitle: Sprite grid rows (1–20); at most 200 cells total
editorVideoSpriteScheduleErrorDuration: Could not read duration or the clip is too short.
editorVideoSpriteScheduleErrorInvalidGri: Enter valid columns and rows (at least 1×1).
editorVideoSpriteScheduleErrorTooManyCel: Too many cells for one sheet (max. {max}).
editorVideoSpriteRunTitle: Save one image with a grid of frames via ffmpeg
editorStatusbarTitleCpu: Software codec {codec}: uses the CPU; best compatibility and fine CRF/bitrate control.
editorStatusbarTitleHwEncoders: HW encoders in this ffmpeg build: {list}
editorStatusbarTitleNvencSessions: NVENC: consumer GeForce cards often allow 2–3 concurrent encode sessions.
quickYtdlpHint: The button below downloads the first recognized URL with your current yt-dlp settings and opens the finished file in this editor. You cannot run it while another download is active — wait or cancel it on the Downloads tab.
quickYtdlpPlaceholder: One URL per line (the button below uses the first recognized URL)
quickYtdlpUrlFieldGroupAria: URL field, paste behavior, and documentation links
